About Me

Senior Software Engineer and Mobile Tech Lead with 10+ years of experience building Android applications at scale. Currently leading mobile development at DoorDash, previously at Amazon and INRIX. Specialized in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and building scalable mobile architectures that serve millions of users. Passionate about mentoring and helping others advance their careers.

Location Nashville, TN
Experience 10+ Years

Technical Skills

android
95% Android
90% Kotlin
85% Compose
desktop_cloud
80% Backend
75% Design
80% Leadership

Work Experience

Nov '21 - Present
3+ years

Sr. Software Engineer | New Verticals Mobile Tech Lead

DoorDash - Grocery

Mobile Consumer Experience - Mobile Technical Lead building Android and backend features while leading iOS engineers. Key deliverables:

  • Built Order Confirmation UI flow from scratch to match iOS parity - surface for ETA, order details, and ad placements
  • Architected backend-driven Dynamic Delivery Options framework with backend infrastructure + Android UI logic
  • Migrated 30+ post-checkout features to unified Consumer Android app with split shipment support
  • Implemented Cart Redirection using DoorDash's SDUI framework

Observability & Developer Velocity - Led on-call leadership, ops reviews, and incident PMs while improving reliability.

Engineering Excellence - Drove code craftsmanship via organization-wide newsletters and mentoring engineers.

Apr '18 - Nov '21
3.5 years

Sr. Software Engineer

Amazon - Amazon Care

Built Audio/Video conferencing capability using WebRTC with real-time quality monitoring. Led Kotlin migration and Coroutines adoption across Android team. Modularized codebase for faster compilation. US Patent 11038933B1

Sept '17 - Apr '18
8 months

Software Engineer

Amazon - Amazon Flex

Optimized large-scale performance issues and built in-app profiling mechanism for customer-facing features.

Dec '15 - Sept '17
2 years

Software Engineer

Amazon - AWS Silk Browser

Led development of leanback experience for Silk on FireTV including HomeMenu launcher and Optimal Navigational Cursor. Implemented complex Intent Handling for FireTablets/FireTV. Optimized memory usage and performance.

Oct '14 - Dec '15
1.5 years

Software Development Engineer

INRIX Inc.

Android Mobile Development for real-time traffic information delivery platform serving business and consumer markets.

Summer 2013 & 2014

Software Engineering Intern

Pacific Northwest National Laboratory (US Dept. of Energy)

Primary developer for Android bio surveillance application using Java EE Framework. Built real-time server-client architecture with push notifications. Won 1st Place in Mobile App Development Competition among team of 4 interns.
